title: No Spiders
description: Resource pack that replaces spiders and everything related, with colored slimes.
body:
## No Spiders
This resource pack replaces the spiders with colored slimes.  
It changes the spiders' models, sounds, items and texts.
  
It can be useful for arachnophobics or players who are not comfortable with spiders.  
  
[Optifine](https://optifine.net/) or [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) **is required!**  
  
![Yellow Slime](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4sPniBUB/images/4db25fc1156f6a1c062dcc3e156e7b479e024cb9.png)
![Blue Slime](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4sPniBUB/images/99846a1e95cc86a39e14e150571feebd3e1df8ba.png)
